mutations.description: Advance from the stale release tick, allowing one late dispatch to remain repeatedly due.
Give a released task its period as a deadline instead of the required bounded relative deadline.
Advance a failed task's next release and silently skip its retry.
mutations.find:
if (status != RTOS_STATUS_OK) return status;

  *next_release = now_ticks + period_ticks;

mutations.description: Give lower-priority telemetry precedence when both releases are due.
Treat a cleared initialization flag as a valid dispatch state.
